title: Stompa Phunk
description: Stompa Phunk has been knocking around Brighton long enough to know what works, the right music, the right moment. Our annual Brighton Fringe party at the Spiegeltent has become something of a ritual. One night a year where this iconic festival venue swaps cabaret for house music. Wood panels, low ceiling, dancefloor. It shouldn’t work for acid house... but it does. Residents Serge Santiago and David Parr plus a special guest TBA. Expect whatever feels right in the moment. It’s intimate, and it sells out.
